testCases.notes: Modal flow uses 'PICK UP HERE' button (not 'Select' + 'Confirm') — semantic deviation but functionally equivalent

testCases.title: Mobile - List/Map Toggle
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] touch targets adequate (min 44x44px) for toggle and close buttons
testCases.notes: List/Map toggle works correctly (PASS for layout/views), but LIST/MAP toggle button is 80x38px — height (38) is below 44x44 WCAG minimum. Close button (68x68) is fine.
Search by name filters list correctly (10 results for 'Bro') after submit (Enter or button click). Auto-debounce not used — explicit submit instead.
Address search '180 Greenwich' returned matching '9/11 Memorial' at 180 Greenwich St

testCases.title: Search - Invalid/Empty Results
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] empty state message shown for invalid input
testCases.notes: App does not crash on invalid search 'xyzabc123' (PASS for no-crash), but NO empty state message is shown. Sidebar shows only the pre-selected location with no 'No results found' text. UX gap.
Search is submit-driven (Enter/button), not debounce-driven. 0 API calls fired during rapid typing of 5 chars in 200ms — better than debounce: zero requests until explicit submit.

testCases.title: Filter - Availability
testCases.notes: Availability filter NOT implemented in UI. Only COUNTRY, STATE/PROVINCE, CITY filter dropdowns are present. Cannot test.

testCases.title: Filter - Distance
testCases.notes: Distance filter NOT implemented. No distance/proximity filter UI present. Cannot test.

testCases.title: Filter - Combined
testCases.notes: Depends on Availability + Distance filters which are not implemented.

testCases.title: Map - Zoom Controls
testCases.notes: Google Maps embedded — only fullscreen control button visible. NO explicit zoom-in/zoom-out buttons rendered. Mouse-wheel/pinch-zoom likely works but UI controls absent. Implementation choice.
Map marker click not tested explicitly — info window single-display. List-driven info card behaves correctly (only one open at a time).

testCases.title: Map - Background Click Close
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] info window closes when clicking map background
testCases.notes: Synthetic click on .gm-style background did NOT close the open info card. May be different for real user clicks but implementation does not propagate background-click → close info window.
Brooklyn Academy of Music card shows: name, Via transfer chip, Address, Working hours (Mon-Sun: 9-18), Contact phone (+10000000061), Contact email, Description (Attraction). All fields present.
Cancel closes info card, modal stays open with prior list state preserved
Confirm (PICK UP HERE) closes both info card and modal, location appears in cart summary, checkout accessible
List scrolls independently — map top position stable when scrolling list
Background scroll lock not explicitly tested — modal is fullscreen overlay so background is not directly accessible
City filter 'Chicago' returned 2 items (1 actual Chicago address + 1 prepended pre-selected location)

State filter UI present with checkbox dropdown showing all states with location counts (Arkansas, California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Michigan, New York 71, North Carolina, Ontario, Tennessee, etc.). Verified visually via screenshot. Click-test had UI interaction limitations but dropdown structure is correct.
Combined filter test — UI present, individual filters verified separately. Full combined behavior not exhaustively tested due to time budget.

VCST-4518 fix holds — map width remains stable at 868px (77.5% of 1120 modal content width) through baseline → no-results submit → clear → valid results. Map ratio always >= 40%. Re-query map element after each search needed to avoid stale-reference 0px reading.
320px viewport: no horizontal scroll, mobile modal renders, MAP toggle works, layout single column
768px tablet: desktop side-by-side layout used (list left, info card center, map right), no horizontal scroll
1920px: modal capped at 1168px width, side-by-side preserved, map ratio ~74%, no excessive stretching

Pickup location persists from cart to checkout (pickup section shows confirmed location). Shipping cost = $0.00 verified (BL-SHIP-002 ✓). Full order placement to confirmation NOT tested to avoid creating real test orders. Treated as PARTIAL PASS for shipping=0 invariant.

testCases.title: Integration - Switch Delivery Methods
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] switching to Delivery clears the previously confirmed pickup location
testCases.notes: Switching Pickup -> Shipping correctly hides pickup section. But switching Shipping -> Pickup PRESERVES the previously confirmed pickup location (Queens Crossing 32-01 Northern Blvd) — pickup not cleared between toggles. May be intentional UX (preserve user choice) but contradicts test spec.
PDP CTA 'Check pickup locations' visible. Modal opens with map and 50-location list.
PDP modal has NO 'Select' or 'Pick up here' buttons (selectBtnCount=0). View-only mode confirmed.
PDP modal map renders with markers, 50 location entries with name+address, modal dimensions stable
Modal close X button keeps user on PDP (URL unchanged), modal cleanly removed from DOM
No circular radio indicators present in PDP modal (radioIndicatorCount=0). noIndicator prop active. Cards use whole-card styling for selection.

Same as BOPIS-014 — info card displays all configured fields (name, address, hours, phone, email, description). Optional fields absent when not configured (no empty placeholders observed on Pickup point info).

testCases.title: VCST-4613 Availability Tooltip on Product Page
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] availability tooltip trigger visible on product page BOPIS widget
testCases.notes: VCST-4613 tooltip not visible on PDP. PDP only shows 'Check pickup locations' CTA — no availability count or tooltip indicator on widget. Feature appears to not be implemented or behind a flag.

testCases.title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - Mobile Responsive (375x667)
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] CTA button tap target adequate on mobile (>= 44x44px)
testCases.notes: PDP BOPIS widget renders on mobile, modal opens, no horizontal scroll. BUT 'Check pickup locations' CTA size = 158x18px — height 18px is FAR below 44px touch target minimum. Modal close button (68x68) is fine. Layout PASS, touch target FAIL.

testCases.title: Pickup Location Modal - Load-More / Pagination with 10+ Locations
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] location list renders at least 10 location entries after load-more / full scroll; total accessible = expected count (102+)
testCases.notes: Aliases.json BOPIS entry says 102 pickup locations exist. UI loads only 50 locations in initial batch. NO 'Load more' button visible. NO infinite scroll trigger fires when scrolling to bottom (count remains 50 after multiple scroll-to-bottom actions). Locations 51-102 are unreachable via the current UI.

testCases.title: VCST-4707 Regression - Confirmed Pagination-Boundary Location Appears at Top of Modal on Reopen
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] LAST_LOCATION appears at or near the top of the location list on reopen — no scrolling required to see it (prepended at index 0)
testCases.notes: VCST-4707 PARTIAL REGRESSION CONFIRMED. Selected DPD-Sanghaj at index 30, confirmed via PICK UP HERE. On modal reopen: radio IS checked correctly on DPD-Sanghaj (totalChecked=1, checkedNames=['DPD - Sanghaj']) — pre-selection state preserved (PASS for that aspect). BUT DPD-Sanghaj remains at index 30 — NOT prepended to index 0. User must scroll past 29 entries to find their selection. Top 5 entries on reopen: Brooklyn Academy of Music, Queens Crossing, Staten Island, Tramsheds, 9/11 Memorial — all at original alphabetical positions. IncludeLocationIds prepend logic NOT active OR not applied client-side.

testCases.title: BVA - Page-1 Boundary Location (Index #50)
testCases.section: BOPIS > Location Selector > Pagination Pre-selection > BVA
testCases.notes: Cannot test page-1 boundary at index #50: the visible list shows only 50 locations and there is no Load More button (see BOPIS-087). Index 49 (last visible) is the practical boundary. Even within visible range, BOPIS-091 already confirmed VCST-4707 prepend logic is failing.

testCases.title: BVA - Page-2 Boundary Location (Index #51)
testCases.section: BOPIS > Location Selector > Pagination Pre-selection > BVA
testCases.notes: Cannot test page-2 boundary: no Load More button visible to fetch beyond initial 50. Index 51+ unreachable via current UI.

bugs.title: VCST-4707 Regression: Confirmed pickup location NOT prepended to top of list on modal reopen
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] LAST_LOCATION appears at or near the top of the location list on reopen (prepended at index 0)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Login as B2B user (test-emily.johnson-20260310@test-agent.com slot 2). 2. Add product to cart (UNTUCKit eGift Card). 3. Open /cart, click 'Pickup' radio. 4. Click pencil icon on 'Pickup point' to open Pick points modal. 5. Scroll down list, click radio for DPD-Sanghaj (index 30 in list). 6. Click PICK UP HERE button — modal closes, location confirmed in cart (2853 Longhua Rd, Sanghaj). 7. Click pencil icon to reopen Pick points modal. 8. Observe location list top 5 entries.
bugs.expected: DPD-Sanghaj appears at index 0 (top of list), prepended via IncludeLocationIds query parameter. Radio checked. User does NOT need to scroll to see their selection.
bugs.actual: DPD-Sanghaj appears at index 30 (its original alphabetical position). Top 5 entries unchanged from initial load: Brooklyn Academy of Music, Queens Crossing, Staten Island Children's Museum, Tramsheds, 9/11 Memorial. Radio IS correctly checked on DPD-Sanghaj (pre-selection state preserved), but visual prepending is NOT applied. User must scroll past 29 entries to confirm their selection.

bugs.title: Pickup location list capped at 50 entries with no Load More — 52 of 102 configured locations unreachable
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] location list renders at least 10 location entries after load-more / full scroll
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Open /cart with product, click Pickup, open Pick points modal. 2. Scroll list to bottom multiple times. 3. Look for 'Load more' button. 4. Count visible entries.
bugs.expected: List loads at least 10+ locations on demand. With 102 configured pickup locations, all should be reachable via Load More button or infinite scroll.
bugs.actual: List shows exactly 50 locations. No 'Load more' button visible. Scrolling list to bottom does NOT trigger any additional load (count stays at 50 after 4 scroll-to-bottom actions). Locations 51-102 are unreachable.

bugs.title: Mobile PDP BOPIS CTA 'Check pickup locations' below 44x44 touch target minimum
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] CTA button tap target adequate on mobile (>= 44x44px)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Resize viewport to 375x667. 2. Navigate to BOPIS-eligible PDP (e.g., /product/bee0d93a-cd70-4313-bc6c-716cb415b43a). 3. Measure 'Check pickup locations' CTA bounding rect.
bugs.expected: CTA touch target >= 44x44px (WCAG 2.1 AA, iOS HIG, Material guidelines).
bugs.actual: CTA size = 158x18px. Width adequate but height (18px) is FAR below 44px minimum. Link-styled instead of button-styled. Difficult to tap reliably on touch devices.

bugs.title: Mobile cart pickup modal LIST/MAP toggle below 44x44 touch target minimum
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] touch targets adequate (min 44x44px) for toggle and close buttons
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Resize viewport to 375x667. 2. Open cart with product, click Pickup. 3. Open Pick points modal. 4. Locate the LIST/MAP toggle button at bottom of modal. 5. Measure bounding rect.
bugs.actual: LIST/MAP toggle = 80x38px. Width OK (80) but height (38) below 44px minimum.

bugs.title: Pickup modal — invalid search query shows no 'No results' empty state message
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] empty state message shown for invalid input
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Open Pick points modal at /cart. 2. Type 'xyzabc123' in search field. 3. Press Enter to submit.
bugs.expected: List shows clear 'No results found' empty state with reset/clear option.
bugs.actual: List shows ONLY the pre-selected pickup location (Queens Crossing) with no explanatory message. User has no signal that their search returned 0 actual matches — the pre-selected location appears as if it might be a match. App does not crash (PASS for non-crash).

bugs.title: Switching delivery method Shipping -> Pickup preserves previously confirmed pickup location instead of clearing
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] switching to Delivery clears the previously confirmed pickup location
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Add product to cart. 2. Click Pickup, select location X via Pick points modal, click PICK UP HERE. 3. Click Shipping radio (delivery method). 4. Click Pickup radio again.
bugs.expected: Pickup location is cleared on Shipping selection (per BL-BOPIS-004). Switching back to Pickup shows empty location prompt requiring re-selection.
bugs.actual: Pickup location X (e.g., Queens Crossing 32-01 Northern Blvd) is preserved across the toggle Pickup -> Shipping -> Pickup. While arguably good UX (don't lose user input), this contradicts the documented business rule.

criticalRegressions: VCST-4707 partial regression on BOPIS-091: prepend-to-top logic for confirmed location is broken (radio state preserved but visual position not adjusted)
BOPIS-087: 52 of 102 configured pickup locations unreachable due to missing Load More UI
criticalPasses: BOPIS-001 + BOPIS-022: VCST-4518 fix holds — map width stable through search/clear cycles, never below 40% of modal width
BOPIS-002 + BOPIS-026: Pickup confirmation flow works end-to-end, shipping = $0.00 (BL-SHIP-002)
BOPIS-029 + BOPIS-032: PDP modal correctly view-only — no Select/PICK UP HERE button, no radio indicators
BOPIS-007: Search uses explicit submit (no rapid-fire API calls during typing)
summary.filterImplementationNote: Cart Pick points modal has COUNTRY/STATE/CITY filters but NO Availability or Distance filters as specified by BOPIS-008/009/010
